Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. STACEY K. LEE, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (Tel: 415-364-5540) for plaintiff;
Atty. SARIT SIMHAYOFF-COHEN, Esq. (Tel: 415-407-4197) for defendant Adi Simayof.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ADI SIMAYOF's Motion For Protective Order.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court confirms with the parties that this motion is unopposed.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant's motion is granted as unopposed.

The Court instructs the moving party to submit a proposed order in Word format to JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Sarit Simhayoff-Cohen, Esq., Attorbey at Law, 415-407-4197, saritsimayof@gmail.com, for Defendant Adi Simayof.
